title: Repair Release NuGet metadata and symbol/source packaging
prompt: The Release packaging configuration for `src/Deterministic.Text/Deterministic.Text.csproj` has regressed: its intended properties are activated for the wrong build configuration. Restore the Release contract in `Directory.Build.props` so version 3.4.2 packs as `Moonshiner.Deterministic.Text`, authored by `Moonshiner Maintainers`, with the existing description, tags, MIT license expression, and git repository URL/type/branch/commit metadata. Release packing must publish repository metadata, create an `snupkg` symbol package, embed sources, and include `TextFingerprint.cs` at `src/TextFingerprint.cs` in the main package. Keep the existing target framework, package and assembly version policy, deterministic-build settings, project packing rules, and public source intact. Do not change the protected test, project, or source files. Verification is an offline project-file contract check and succeeds with `python3 -B tests/test_release_package.py` from the repository root; it does not require the .NET SDK.
